tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Americans have had enough of the bottom 2% of society ruining our lives “I'm gonna be so blunt. Because of the ghetto-ass activities that happened in Newport Beach — we are now going to see next year a more secure minimum confined prison in the area because of these f*cking parasites that should be locked up in a cage — This bottom 2% people of society cause all of our problems. I know you don't want to hear it. I know it might be mean, but they do. And if we just threw them all in jail, put them in mental asylums where they all belong, all of our problems would go away — but tax the rich, the billionaires. No, Elon Musk isn't taking a sh*t outside of a 7-Eleven and stealing sh*t” I agree with every word. Our society and way of life is being ruined by the bottom 2% of society. We don’t have to live like this, these people should not get to destroy our lives and be parasites off the system The bottom 1% are leaching the welfare system causing astronomical taxes, then these same people cause chaos all throughout society
tweets.translated: @elonmusk 的转发：美国人已经受够了社会底层 2% 的人毁掉我们的生活“我会这么直白。由于纽波特海滩发生的贫民区活动，明年我们将在该地区看到一个更安全的最低密闭监狱，因为这些该死的寄生虫应该被关在笼子里——社会底层 2% 的人造成了我们所有的问题。我知道你不想听。我知道这可能会发生。如果我们把他们全部关进监狱，把他们关进精神病院，我们所有的问题都会消失——但是向富人、亿万富翁征税，不，埃隆·马斯克不会在 7-11 店外偷东西。”我同意每句话。我们的社会和生活方式正在被社会底层2%的人破坏。我们不必这样生活，这些人不应该破坏我们的生活，成为体制外的寄生虫。最底层的 1% 人正在榨取福利体系，造成天文数字的税收，然后这些人就会在整个社会造成混乱。

tweets.content: Platforms treat users differently. Numbers speak.

tweets.content: This is the average visual TA bro, takes a 50% 50% coinflip: If it goes the other way, they say "ABC Pattern Invalidated", should have known... If they get the coinflip right, they promote their $40/month chart. -> People drawing swiggly lines over KOSPI mean nothing where it heads. When it's primarily Samsung/SK Hynix and forward operating income growth from DRAM/NAND. -> The swiggly drawing over $SIVE, $AEHR, and others mean nothing. When it's primarily hyperscaler suppliers, thematic premiums, and volume ramp orders determining valuations. Then if something randomly goes from $1 to $60 like $AXTI, they claim they spotted it with their "Golden Egg Dragon Candle", while ignoring anything with InP substrate and otpical demand. There's rare times like these where it's a massive sector drop all together. But now the TA bros are showing up everywhere saying here's a $40 course on how they predicted it with swiggly lines.
tweets.translated: 这是平均视觉 TA 兄弟，需要 50% 50% 硬币翻转：如果情况相反，他们会说“ABC 模式无效”，应该知道......如果他们得到正确的硬币翻转，他们会宣传他们的 40 美元/月图表。 -> 人们在 KOSPI 上画出的曲线对它的走向毫无意义。主要是三星/SK 海力士，并且预期营业收入增长来自 DRAM/NAND。 -> 对 $SIVE、$AEHR 和其他的摇摇晃晃的绘图没有任何意义。当主要是超大规模供应商时，主题溢价和批量订单决定了估值。然后，如果某个东西随机从 1 美元到 60 美元（例如 $AXTI），他们声称他们用“金蛋龙蜡烛”发现了它，而忽略了任何具有 InP 基材和光学需求的东西。很少有像现在这样出现行业大幅下跌的情况。但现在 TA 兄弟到处出现，说这里有一个 40 美元的课程，教他们如何用摇摆线预测它。

tweets.content: Just putting it out there: If everything crashes together from $NBIS, $MRVL, $INTC, $SNDK, $AMD, $SIVE, $MU, $LITE, and others... Which are all down -4% to -10%+ today so far. Probably doesn't have anything to do with individual fundamentals. Indiscriminate selloffs from things like cascading margin liquidations, usually provide compelling opportunities if the underlying improves.
tweets.translated: 只是把它放在那里：如果 $NBIS、$MRVL、$INTC、$SNDK、$AMD、$SIVE、$MU、$LITE 和其他所有东西一起崩溃......到目前为止，它们今天都下跌了 -4% 到 -10%+。可能和个人的基本面没有什么关系。如果基本面改善，诸如级联保证金清算之类的不加选择的抛售通常会提供令人信服的机会。

tweets.content: Raymond James initiated coverage of $SPCX with “Strong Buy”. Giving it a $800 PT, valuing SpaceX at a ~$10T valuation. No words. Jokes about “institutional” notes for retail write themselves.
tweets.translated: Raymond James 开始对 $SPCX 进行“强力买入”报道。给予 800 美元的 PT，对 SpaceX 的估值约为 10T 美元。没有言语。关于零售业“机构”票据的笑话是他们自己写的。
